overall.description: A cinematic drone shot from the video game Cyberpunk 2077, showing a flooded, destroyed urban street at night with a large fire burning in the center. The camera moves forward and ascends from a low angle near the water to a high aerial view, revealing the devastated cityscape and distant neon-lit skyscrapers against a dark smoky sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded destroyed street with central burning wreckage

agents.ego_description: low altitude drone flight moving forward over flooded debris field toward the burning wreckage

entered.detail: tall vertical neon sign with 'CYBERPUNK' text illuminated in white
large pile of debris with intense orange flames and glowing embers
water-covered asphalt reflecting city lights and fire glow
stack of wrecked cars and debris partially submerged in water
tall modern buildings with illuminated windows and neon accents
thick black smoke column rising from the central fire

segments.scene_description: The drone moves at low altitude over a flooded, debris-strewn street toward a large burning wreckage. The water reflects the orange firelight and distant neon signs, while destroyed vehicles litter the left side and skyscrapers loom in the smoky background.

scene_state.functional_zone: devastated urban intersection with highway overpass

events.description: camera begins ascending while continuing forward, revealing highway structure on right

agents.ego_description: drone ascending to mid-altitude to reveal surrounding urban context and infrastructure

entered.detail: elevated concrete highway ramp with street lighting

segments.scene_description: As the drone ascends, the perspective widens to show a highway overpass on the right and more of the devastated urban landscape. The burning wreckage recedes into the middle distance while the scale of the destruction becomes apparent.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial overview of flooded downtown district

events.description: reaches high altitude providing bird's eye view of the entire devastated area

agents.ego_description: high altitude drone survey capturing the full extent of urban devastation and city layout

entered.detail: network of elevated highways and interchanges with moving light trails
brightly lit modern buildings with colorful neon signage

segments.scene_description: From high altitude, the drone captures a sweeping view of the flooded destruction zone with the burning wreckage now a small orange glow below. The surrounding city infrastructure, including highways and neon-lit buildings, frames the devastated area against the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that ascends from a low-angle glide over a flooded street into a sweeping aerial vista of a devastated cityscape. It begins at a low altitude, skimming over debris-strewn water that reflects the orange glow of a massive burning wreckage and distant neon signs. As the drone climbs, the perspective widens to reveal a highway overpass and the true scale of the urban destruction, causing the fire to recede into the middle distance. The scene then expands into a high-altitude view where the burning wreckage becomes a small orange ember amidst a vast zone of flooding. Finally, the camera captures the entire ruined district framed by towering neon-lit skyscrapers and sprawling infrastructure against a dark, smoky night sky.
